name: Name
order-placed-successfully: Your order has been placed successfully!
order-placement-failed: There was an error placing your order.
no-products-available: No products available at the moment.
invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
stripe-not-configured: Stripe payment gateway is not configured.
presupuesto-creation-failed: Failed to create the native presupuesto.
order-payment-cancelled: Payment was cancelled. Your cart is still available.
bot-report-email: Send daily bot report by email
bot-reports-title: AI bot and search engine visits
bot-reports-help: Daily report generated at 08:00 with visits from AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini...) and search engines. Untick the box in the YeveaStore tab to stop the emails.
bot-reports-empty: No reports yet. The first one is generated tomorrow at 08:00.
yevea-doc-help: Editable document: add notes as you learn. Stored in MyFiles, survives plugin updates.
invalid-dimensions: The entered dimensions are not valid.
olive-wood-desc: High-quality olive wood sourced directly from our sawmill. Olive wood is prized for its unique grain, durability and natural beauty.
wood-planks-desc: Solid wood planks available in various dimensions. Ideal for carpentry, cabinet-making and construction projects.
olive-wood-boards-desc: Custom-cut olive wood boards. Cut to your dimensions for worktops, tables and decoration projects.
rustic-bathroom-countertops-desc: Rustic bathroom countertops made from solid olive wood. Each piece is unique with natural grain and textures for your bathroom.
kitchen-countertops-desc: Kitchen countertops made from solid olive wood. Durable, hygienic and of exceptional natural beauty for your kitchen.
cutting-boards-desc: Handcrafted olive wood cutting boards. Naturally antibacterial, durable and elegant for your kitchen.
olive-wood-crafts-desc: Unique handcrafted pieces made from olive wood. Each creation is hand-carved from carefully selected olive wood.
sawmill-desc: Sawmill specialising in olive wood and custom wood products for France, Spain, Germany and the whole of Europe.
capture-error: Save failed. Check your connection and try again.
capture-tab-intro: Installable mobile app (PWA) to register planks and other products from the warehouse, no login required: camera photos, dimensions, weight and pile. Each capture creates the product with an automatic SKU and a stock of 1 unit, awaiting your approval.
capture-install-step1: Open yevea.com/cat/capturar on the warehouse phone (no login needed).
capture-install-step2: Tap “Install app” when offered (or use the browser ⋮ menu → “Add to Home screen”).
capture-install-step3: The app stays on the phone’s home screen, ready to capture.
capture-tab-note: Captured products do NOT appear in the store until you approve them here. Before approving, review name, price and photos via “Edit”.
capture-queued-desc: The capture will be sent automatically when coverage returns.
capture-offline-no-meta: Offline and no cached data: open the app once with internet to enable offline capture.
calc-mode-help: With Area or Volume, the customer enters measurements on the product page and the price is calculated: product unit price × measure.
calc-show-unit-price: Show price per unit on the frontend
calc-dim-options-help: Empty = free input (bounded by the family min/max). List "60; 61; 70.5" or range "60-99", combinable: shown as a dropdown.
calc-capture-rates-help: Used by YeveaCaptura to price a slab at capture time: the €/m² of the range containing its thickness is applied.
calc-save-family-first: Save the family first to configure its Price Table.
